steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is “The historian's books”—the head noun is books, which is plural. The possessive “historian's” and the prepositional phrase “about Zachary Taylor” modify the subject but don't change its number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match the subject's number. Since the subject is plural, the verb must be plural—”are” is the only plural form. The other three are singular and violate this rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
